reference: Hi, my name is Helen. I have been suffering from severe bloating and discomfort in the left side of my neck, as well as feeling like throwing up because something is stuck in my throat. I also experience tightness in my chest. I take Omeprazole twenty milligrams for a stomach ulcer, but this is happening more regularly after eating or just at any time while resting or doing things.
text: Hi, my name is Helen. I have been suffering from severe bloating and discomfort in the left side of my neck, as well as feeling like throwing up because something is stuck in my throat. I also experience tightness in my chest. I take Omeprazole twenty milligrams for a stomach ulcer, but this is happening more regularly after eating, or just at any time while resting or doing things.
